subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Through the grace and bounty of the Ancient Beauty, I hope that thy countenance may ever be illumined with the light of steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق از فضل و موهبت جمال قدم امیدوارم که رویت بنور ثبوت دائما ابدا
subcodes.subjects: @law of repetition; recitation of the Greatest Name, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @Greatest Name, @firmness in the Covenant
